title: HotbarFlow
description: Customizable numeric labels for each hotbar slot in Minecraft + Tooltip Animation
body:
The Hotbar Number Mod adds clear, customizable numeric labels to each hotbar slot in Minecraft, making it easier for players to quickly identify and switch to the desired item using the corresponding number key. It also features animated tooltips that smoothly appear when you hover over hotbar items, providing additional item information with a stylish visual effect. This enhances both inventory management and the overall gameplay experience.
